rows.label: xs33440110_MSG0020
rows.name:
The transfer energy charged in the
core is decreasing, if only slightly![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33440110_MSG0030
rows.name:
I think Void's own power, now assimilated
with the core, is weakening.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33440110_MSG0040
rows.name: I see. So this is the effect of the "spears."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33440110_MSG0050
rows.name:
To make certain of it, let's
activate the remaining "spears."[ST:wait ]
